compiled_state.title: Create scripts/ticket/ Python package directory
compiled_state.author: Test
compiled_state.description:
## Testing Mode
GREEN

## Overview
Create the plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/ directory as an empty Python package. This is a scaffolding prerequisite that must complete before ticket processor extraction task (f046-3235) runs — that task places extracted processors inside this package.

## Files to Create
- plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/__init__.py — empty Python package init file

## Implementation
Create plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/__init__.py with content:
  """Ticket processor package — populated by ticket-reducer extraction task."""

The extraction task (f046-3235: ticket-reducer processors) will add re-export statements to this __init__.py as it creates processor modules inside this package.

## Acceptance Criteria

Unit test exemption (integration exemption criterion 2: scaffolding task — no behavioral contract to assert, any test would be a change-detector verifying file existence only).

- [ ] bash tests/run-all.sh passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && bash tests/run-all.sh
- [ ] ruff check passes (exit 0)
  Verify: cd $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel) && ruff check plugins/dso/scripts/*.py tests/**/*.py 2>/dev/null || true
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/ directory exists
  Verify: test -d $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket
- [ ] plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/__init__.py exists
  Verify: test -f $(git rev-parse --show-toplevel)/plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/__init__.py

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 2/6: Code patterns understood (files read: plugins/dso/scripts/; exemplars read: plugins/dso/scripts/figma_merge/__init__.py) ✓

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 3/6: Tests written (none required — scaffolding task, TDD exemption criterion 2) ✓

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 4/6: Implementation BLOCKED — cannot create plugins/dso/scripts/ticket/ directory because plugins/dso/scripts/ticket is already a shell script file (8739 bytes, executable). mkdir fails with 'File exists'. Created bug ticket de8a-ed90 to track. The ticket shell script (DSO CLI dispatcher) occupies the path where the Python package directory needs to go. Resolution requires either: (a) renaming the ticket shell script, or (b) choosing a different package name (e.g. ticket_processors/). This is outside sub-agent ownership scope.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 5/6: Validation skipped — implementation blocked by naming conflict (see CHECKPOINT 4/6)

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done — task failed due to naming conflict blocker. AC results: directory exists: FAIL, __init__.py exists: FAIL. Bug ticket de8a-ed90 filed for orchestrator resolution.

comments.body: CHECKPOINT 6/6: Done — naming conflict blocker. AC: directory exists: FAIL, __init__.py: FAIL. Bug de8a-ed90 filed.
comments.author: Test

comments.body: CORRECTION: Cannot use scripts/ticket/ — plugins/dso/scripts/ticket is an existing shell script (DSO CLI dispatcher). Following figma_merge/ exemplar convention (snake_case of source file basename), use plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/ instead. Corrected acceptance criteria: test -d plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer && test -f plugins/dso/scripts/ticket_reducer/__init__.py
comments.author: Test
